memory.summary: My teammate asked me to take over their part due to an emergency, but I only planned to finish my own share this afternoon.
Teammate_A is flexible about splitting or deferring work if I push back, and they accepted my boundary without resentment.

I advanced my project portion, but the teammate's missing task and the imminent deadline mean I still have critical work to finish in under an hour.
I finished my group project portion just as the deadline passed, leaving it incomplete. I am now exhausted with high stress and sleep debt.
I advanced my project share, but the missing teammate task and high stress mean I still face critical work before an imminent deadline.
I made progress on my share, but the teammate's missing task and tight deadline mean critical work remains. My high stress and sleep debt make continuing difficult.
I advanced my project share slightly, but the missing teammate task and my exhausted state mean critical work remains before the deadline.
I let the moment pass without acting, leaving critical work undone while my energy is depleted and stress remains high.
I made progress on my project share, but my depleted energy and high stress suggest I cannot continue working effectively right now.
